privileged_info_summary: The task performs web scraping and SEO analysis on https://books.toscrape.com/, a real, publicly accessible demo website explicitly designed for web scraping practice. The website contains approximately 1,000 books across 50 categories with complete product information. The task uses Screaming Frog SEO Spider, a professional web crawling tool, to export internal link data with Source, Destination, and Anchor columns into a CSV file. The generated report must contain numeric counts, URL references, anchor text analysis, and recommendations, with a minimum length of 500 bytes. All data originates from real HTTP requests to the live website, not from synthetic/local test data.
